pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 11 if the source/target version remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on JDK 11 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject removed from JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject classes are no longer available in the JDK module path, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation removed from JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation classes are no longer available in the JDK module path, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compilation errors.
